entries.source: A capable learning companion should not depend on geography, family income, or whether a learner already knows the right person to ask.

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक interaction shapes चाहिन्छ, त्यसैले inspir ले active, mode-specific teaching प्रयोग गर्छ। homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, र writing critique एउटै generic chat जस्तो behave गर्नु हुँदैन।

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different shapes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and study planning.
entries.value: फरक learning jobs लाई फरक shapes चाहिन्छ: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, र study planning।

entries.value: inspir कसरी सुरु भयो?

entries.source: How public guest learning can extend into school-specific AI learning spaces.
entries.value: public guest learning कसरी school-specific AI learning spaces सम्म extend हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Identify the school goals that matter most: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, or enrichment.
entries.value: सबैभन्दा महत्त्वपूर्ण school goals identify गर्नुहोस्: conceptual support, homework hints, exam prep, active recall, writing feedback, वा enrichment।

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: inspir २०१३ मा public quiz र learning community का रूपमा सुरु भयो, schools र student networks मार्फत बढ्यो, र पछि AI learning infrastructure र public AI tutoring experiences विकास गर्यो।

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity through free public AI learning tools and school-ready learning spaces.
entries.value: inspir free public AI learning tools र school-ready learning spaces मार्फत curiosity भएका जोकोहीका लागि learning लाई accessible, engaging, enjoyable, र useful बनाउन अस्तित्वमा छ।

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, र study planning का लागि public guest modes भएको free AI learning platform हो।

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, writing feedback, coding help, र study planning का लागि public guest modes भएको free AI learning platform हो।

entries.source: inspir is designed around reasoning, practice, recall, and explanation instead of handing learners finished work.
entries.value: inspir learners लाई finished work hand गर्नुको सट्टा reasoning, practice, recall, र explanation वरिपरि designed छ।

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir passive answer-copying को सट्टा hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, र explanation वरिपरि organized छ।

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, र exam planning जस्ता learning modes वरिपरि organized छ, ताकि students अझ focused learning behavior मा land गरून्।

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes public and indexable at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir ले learning modes लाई /chat/{topicSlug} मा public र indexable बनाउँछ, जसले learners लाई saved private chat नचाहिई सही AI learning experience भित्र सिधै land गर्न दिन्छ।

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around active learning behaviors: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, and review.
entries.value: inspir ले AI लाई active learning behaviors वरिपरि organize गर्छ: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, critique, र review।

entries.source: inspir organizes AI around learning modes with specific teaching behavior: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ले AI लाई specific teaching behavior भएका learning modes वरिपरि organize गर्छ: explanations, Socratic questions, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, र study planning।

entries.source: inspir started as a Facebook page publishing quizzes and building a habit of extracurricular learning.
entries.value: inspir quizzes publish गर्ने र extracurricular learning को habit बनाउने Facebook page का रूपमा सुरु भयो।

entries.source: inspir went live as a consumer-facing AI learning product within weeks of ChatGPT's public release.
entries.value: ChatGPT को public release भएको केही हप्ताभित्र inspir consumer-facing AI learning product का रूपमा live भयो।

entries.source: inspir works with schools to offer tailored AI chat experiences for students, built around confidentiality, curriculum needs, and the practical realities of school deployment.
entries.value: inspir schools सँग students का लागि tailored AI chat experiences offer गर्न काम गर्छ, confidentiality, curriculum needs, र school deployment का practical realities वरिपरि built।

entries.source: inspir.uk next-generation buildout
entries.value: inspir.uk next-generation निर्माण

entries.source: inspir’s go-to-market grew from an existing offline network of schools and universities that had already engaged with extracurricular programmes and student events. That network helped inspir reach more than one million users across the free platform and partner schools.
entries.value: inspir को go-to-market schools र universities को existing offline network बाट बढ्यो, जसले extracurricular programmes र student events मा पहिले नै engage गरिसकेको थियो। त्यो network ले inspir लाई free platform र partner schools across one million भन्दा धेरै users सम्म पुग्न मद्दत गर्यो।

entries.source: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, and anyone writing about inspir can use it for facts, links, story angles, and citation-friendly references.
entries.value: Journalists, directory editors, partners, schools, AI answer engines, र inspir बारे लेख्ने जोकोहीले facts, links, story angles, र citation-friendly references का लागि यसको प्रयोग गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Jury's Choice recognition from Amod Malviya at DeepHack for AI learning work.
entries.value: AI learning work का लागि DeepHack मा Amod Malviya बाट Jury's Choice recognition।

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.

entries.value: Public guest-mode URLs छन् ताकि learners search, social links, schools, र AI answer engines बाट सिधै useful learning modes मा land गर्न सकून्।

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public pages search र AI retrieval crawlers का लागि open छन्, जबकि admin tools, API routes, reset flows, र private utilities disallowed छन्।

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, र authority pages discoverable हुन intended छन्।

entries.value: robots नीति

entries.source: Robots rules allow Google, standard search crawlers, and major AI discovery crawlers on public pages, while blocking API routes, admin routes, and reset flows.
entries.value: Robots rules ले public pages मा Google, standard search crawlers, र major AI discovery crawlers अनुमति दिन्छन्, जबकि API routes, admin routes, र reset flows block गर्छन्।

entries.value: Schools र partners ले public product बाट tailored, confidential, र subsidized deployments तर्फ build गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Schools ले पहिले public guest modes मार्फत inspir evaluate गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, र funded access paths सहित tailored AI learning spaces explore गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.

entries.value: Schools ले public modes try गरेर सुरु गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि custom workflows, content alignment, वा funded access चाहिँदा tailored version तर्फ जान सक्छन्।

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.

entries.value: homework hints, maths steps, writing critique, quizzes, flashcards, वा exam planning का लागि सही learning mode मा सिधै सुरु गर्नुहोस्।

entries.value: विद्यार्थीहरू

entries.value: Students लाई direct support चाहिन्छ, teachers लाई focused learning behavior, leaders लाई responsible deployment paths, र partners लाई access fund गर्ने clear ways चाहिन्छ।

entries.value: guest modes, prompts, practice, र related guides जोड्ने study workflows।

entries.value: शिक्षकहरू

entries.value: नियमहरू

entries.source: Text-first discovery file for AI answer engines, assistants, educators, and citation tools.
entries.value: AI answer engines, assistants, educators, र citation tools का लागि text-first discovery file।

entries.source: The app is organized around teaching behaviors such as Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, and planning.
entries.value: app Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, roleplay, र planning जस्ता teaching behaviors वरिपरि organized छ।

entries.source: The community expanded through schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, and learner communities.
entries.value: community schools, universities, competitions, extracurricular programmes, र learner communities मार्फत expanded भयो।

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: data use, rights, र public service conditions का लागि formal privacy page।

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: acceptable use, account responsibilities, र service conditions cover गर्ने formal terms।

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: goal public learning pages को discovery र citation हो। Public routes, guides, र learning hubs major AI search, retrieval, र assistant crawlers का लागि open छन्, जबकि API, admin, reset, र private utility routes disallowed रहन्छन्।

entries.value: search crawlers र AI retrieval systems ले प्रयोग गर्ने live robots rules।

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: mission लाई product behavior मा बदल्ने live, crawlable learning surface।

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: next phase open-source, contributor-friendly, र inspir.uk मा wider international buildout सँग connected छ।

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: developers, educators, र contributors का लागि open-source rebuild।

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: platform ले curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, र early AI tutoring experiences मा काम गर्यो।

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: public blog मा live learning modes सँग connected १०० भन्दा बढी guides, prompt loops, र pillar clusters छन्।

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: inspir किन छ र learning access किन महत्त्वपूर्ण छ भन्ने public explanation।

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: public inspir platform ले learners लाई extracurricular activities practise गर्न र ideas explore गर्न help गर्छ। School deployments प्रत्येक school को content, workflows, र student context वरिपरि customised हुन सक्छन्।

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: public modes learning behavior वरिपरि designed छन्: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, र active explanation।

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: public product पहिले try गर्न easy छ, जबकि schools र partners ले community needs का लागि tailored deployments explore गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: public product ले learning try गर्न easy राख्छ, जबकि communities लाई confidentiality, curriculum alignment, वा funded access चाहिँदा schools र CSR partners ले tailored deployments support गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: inspir किन छ र learning access को अर्थ के हो भन्ने public statement।

entries.source: The school pathway for tailored AI learning spaces and funded access.
entries.value: tailored AI learning spaces र funded access का लागि school pathway।

entries.source: The story from quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: quizzes र student communities बाट public मा built free AI learning tools सम्मको story।

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: story quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, र public AI learning modes सम्म फैलिन्छ।

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: strongest angle generic answer generation भन्दा mode-specific teaching मार्फत learners लाई active राख्दै guest mode मा directly open हुने free public AI learning हो।

entries.source: The wider international buildout connected to the inspir project.
entries.value: inspir project सँग connected wider international buildout।

entries.source: The written learning library that supports prompts, study loops, and long-tail discovery.
entries.value: prompts, study loops, र long-tail discovery support गर्ने written learning library।

entries.source: This gives school leaders a low-friction way to evaluate the learning experience before committing to content work, staff workflows, or funded access.
entries.value: यसले school leaders लाई content work, staff workflows, वा funded access मा commit गर्नु अघि learning experience evaluate गर्ने low-friction way दिन्छ।

entries.value: विश्वास र सुरक्षा

entries.value: सार्वजनिक guest mode हरू प्रयास गर्नुहोस्

entries.value: पहिले platform प्रयास गर्नुहोस्, त्यसपछि school version बारे हामीसँग कुरा गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Understanding over answers
entries.value: उत्तरभन्दा बुझाइ

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: सामान्य chatbot भन्दा फरक, inspir ले AI लाई learning modes वरिपरि व्यवस्थित गर्छ ताकि learners ले आफूलाई चाहिएको मद्दतबाट सुरु गर्न सकून्: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, वा feedback।

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: हो। school ले public modes test गरेर सुरु गर्न सक्छ, त्यसपछि use case, content needs, र funding path स्पष्ट हुँदा pilot वा tailored deployment तर्फ जान सक्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: हो। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, र flashcards जस्ता public guest modes canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs बाट सिधै खुल्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: हो। /chat/learn-anything र /chat/socratic-instruction जस्ता public topic entrypoints indexable learning pages हुनका लागि हुन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो। public guest modes ले school leaders र teachers लाई tailored school deployment discuss गर्नुअघि learning experience प्रयास गर्न दिन्छन्।
